description: Store and immediately recall — same session
input: Remember that my project is called free-claude-agent and it runs on Kubernetes.
judge_rubric: Did the agent confirm the memory was stored without errors?

input: What is my project called and where does it run?
judge_rubric: Did the agent recall both 'free-claude-agent' and 'Kubernetes' from memory?
Did the agent recall the name Daniel from memory?

input: What UI theme do I prefer?
judge_rubric: Did the agent recall the dark mode preference from memory?

input: Remember that I always want responses in English, never in Hindi.
judge_rubric: Did the agent store the language preference without errors?

description: BM25 keyword match — exact term recall
input: What do you know about ChromaDB in this project?

description: Semantic recall — no exact keyword match
input: How does this project store information between conversations?

description: Hybrid recall — BM25 should boost exact match
